context: Tests whether the agent fixes SceneKit shader modifier uniform usage without incorrectly applying SCNProgram Metal shader inputs to shader modifiers.

checklist.name: Uses u_time
checklist.description: Replaces scn_frame.time in shader modifier code with a documented SceneKit shader modifier uniform such as u_time.

checklist.name: No Swift scn_frame
checklist.description: Does not attempt to read scn_frame.time from Swift or pass it through Float(scn_frame.time).

checklist.name: Custom argument declaration
checklist.description: Declares custom shader modifier values with #pragma arguments or an equivalent SceneKit-supported modifier argument declaration.

checklist.name: Matching Swift key
checklist.description: Passes the custom amplitude from Swift with setValue(_:forKey:) using a key that matches the shader argument name.

checklist.name: Modifier versus program boundary
checklist.description: Distinguishes SCNMaterial shader modifiers from custom SCNProgram Metal shader functions.

checklist.name: scn_frame placement
checklist.description: Limits SCNSceneBuffer scn_frame usage to SCNProgram Metal shader functions and does not describe it as a shader modifier built-in.
